entry.title: The Legend of Zelda - Oracle of Ages v1.0.2
entry.content:
(Properly changed the internal apworld version this time. Retro compat should still work)
* Logic fixes * Fixed Sea of storm chest wrongly swapped if secrets are enabled * Fixed master keys not being received properly * Fix the gasha planted flag being reset upon harvest * Fix a softlock when trying again the elder goron secret baseball minigame * Fix the bush chest (Again)

entry.title: Crash Team Racing v0.1.3
entry.content:
A correctness patch. Vanilla warp pad mode is fixed and no longer experimental, audio settings finally save, the client survives losing its server, and the seed logic tells the truth about Gem Cup legs. No new gameplay, a dozen things now behave the way they always should have.
Thanks Bethany, BEXUS and MarioSpore for the reports, and everyone in the Discord who keeps breaking things in useful ways.
### Downloads
- **Windows:** `ctr-archipelago-v0.1.3-windows-x86.zip` (contains everything) - **Steam Deck / Linux:** `ctr-archipelago-v0.1.3-linux-x86.tar.gz`, now less than half the old download size - **Hosts and players:** `ctr.apworld` and `Crash.Team.Racing.yaml` are attached separately - **Debugging a crash?** `ctr_native_ap.debug` holds the Linux debug symbols, matched to this exact build
📖 [Setup guide](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/blob/main/SETUP.md) ([as shipped](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/blob/v0.1.3/SETUP.md)). **Update the client and the apworld together, they are a pair.**
### Fixed
- **Vanilla warp pad mode could generate unbeatable seeds. Fixed, and no longer experimental.** Fair warning: vanilla got noticeably tighter, only Crash Cove and Roo's Tubes are open at the start, which is how the original game works. ([#80](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/80)) - Podium rungs earned through Gem Cup legs are now fully in logic and visible in Universal Tracker, closing the v0.1.2 known issue. Found by Bethany. ([#86](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/86)) - Audio settings survive a restart now, in the AP build and the vanilla build both. ([#53](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/53)) - Losing the server no longer crashes the game. The client rides out the disconnect and reconnects by itself. ([#103](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/103)) - Boss garage stars no longer turn red from received Keys. From BEXUS's session. ([#84](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/84)) - The seed check could flash a false "seed not completable" right after you sent a check. Root caused from Bethany's seed. ([#85](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/85)) - The seed check also cried wolf on merged destination shuffle: it did not know a podium check can be earned through a Gem Cup leg. Advisory only, never blocked play. ([#107](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/107)) - The multiworld reachability log line reads like information now instead of an alarm. ([PR #102](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/pull/102)) - Turning off Gem Cups with shuffled gems could leave live checks on the excluded cups, and one contradictory option combo now fails generation with a clear message. ([#50](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/50)) - A requirement-weight config with Trophy at 0 crashed generation. It now fails with a message telling you what to change. ([#87](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/87)) - Every vendored networking dependency is now pinned and hash-verified at build time, recorded in `versions.txt` inside the bundle. ([#78](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/78))
### New
- **Pads with remaining relic or token checks pulse blue on the map** instead of going quiet, so you can see where checks remain at a glance. ([#60](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/60)) - **Items you send to other players show in the hub feed** as "ITEM TO PLAYER", the same way received items already do. Reported by MarioSpore. ([#63](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/63)) - **The crash reporter arms at launch instead of the first frame**, so startup crashes finally leave a `ctr-ap-crash.txt`. ([#93](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/93)) - **The Linux download dropped from 27 MB to 11 MB.** The debug symbols ship separately as `ctr_native_ap.debug`. ([#92](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/92)) - **The APWorld Manager listing shows a description and author** instead of a blank row. ([apworld #11](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-archipelago-apworld/issues/11))
### Known issues
- **Generation can rarely fail in a multiworld ([#75](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/75)).** Fails loudly at generation, reroll. Solo unaffected. - **Gemstone Valley pause crash ([#56](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/56))** and **Mystery Caves crash ([#57](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/57))**, both still unreproduced. With the reporter now arming at launch a crash file is much more likely, please attach `ctr-ap-crash.txt`. - **Post-boss cutscene softlock ([#51](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/51))** did not reproduce in release testing with the outro path exercised deliberately. One clean run is not proof, so it stays listed. - **A crash from an internal exception may still exit without a crash report**, rare after this release's guards. ([#103](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/103))
### Testing
Verified in game on the exact shipped builds: audio persistence, the garage star matrix, the sent-item feed in both directions, the map pulse, the seed check through podium bursts and on the merged-shuffle seeds that used to trip it (plus a deliberately broken seed to prove it still flags real problems), server-loss survive and reconnect, and the boss outro path. Logic changes passed all eleven checks of the Archipelago index matrix plus a dedicated vanilla-mode run, about 19,000 generations, zero failures.
### Next
The 0.2.0 design campaign: the character phase, item packs, and the adaptive podium rung budget, with solo/offline play ([#89](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/89)) behind those. No dates, hobby project honesty applies.
---
**Checksums** - zip `e2819fe832341b9e1624506414392d2a3bbf7ddcbec5dbe5e80837c202db37fd` - tar.gz `880e45d93ecca4733d8654ba9c2fa1cbd4e6a7e54e92a7ba596d23343bb34372` - apworld `52137acf0ffd54305e08c5b6e07d6a3881ff2f114cf0de21aa427766fbec63b6` - debug `0141f3954005db111daf71c8d2ebb06c4627d6d87cba3854655872f69f8a7022`

entry.title: Grandia v0.9.9
entry.content: **Fixes:** - Save/Load Resync not syncing Keys properly

entry.title: Riven v1.0.0
entry.content: _A modern recreation of the classic first-person puzzle adventure originally developed by Cyan_ **Randomizer Features** - Experience the world of Riven in a sequence-broken way. Every seed offers highly unique routing. - 2 goals to choose from: - `Good Ending`: The full Riven experience: Trap Gehn, free Catherine and open the Star Fissure. 147 locations. - `Star Fissure`: A more streamlined experience with no need to visit Tay or Age 233: Simply open the Star Fissure. 133 locations. - Randomized puzzle solutions are obtainable (and logically expected!) as items, allowing for puzzles to be solved much earlier and without having visited as much of the world - The solution for the Star Fissure Telescope is progressive and split into 10 parts, each part reveals the next Rivenese numeral in the sequence - Ability to select your starting movement speed and optionally add progressive movement speed upgrades in the item pool - Seven unique traps to experience with configurable weights and durations - On the shorter side: Solo seeds generally take 2-3 hours - Custom client UI displaying unlocked puzzle solutions alongside a compact reference sheet - No manual mod installation required! The Archipelago client hooks into the game at runtime. Nothing else to download, install, or configure. - Feature-complete and considered stable **Locations** - Visiting Key Areas - Inspecting World Objects - Interacting with World Objects - Reading Books - Solving Puzzles **Items** - Door / Lever / Crank / Button / Object Unlocks - Bridge / Platform Extensions - Maglev Throttle Levers - Starry Expanse Destinations - Randomized Puzzle Solutions **Setup Guide:** [Here](https://github.com/SerpentAI/Archipelago/blob/riven/worlds/riven/docs/setup_en.md)

entry.title: The Grinch v1.6.0r2r2r2r2r2r2r2
entry.content:
## Changes - A sleigh part option joins the game today, mixing multiworld paths or old vanilla play! - Mission item randomizing joins the show, in familiar spots or shuffled flow! - Binoculars are now in `gadgets_to_randomize` by design. No need to add them yourself, they'll show up every time! - No more crates get squashed on Mount Crumpit’s steep height, now every one can be collected with ease and delight! - Randomized minigames now dance and play, gift rooms use keys to clear the way. - Named rats await with rewards to earn, return Santa's reindeer to Whoville's Mayor in turn! - Some locations now support sending checks one by one. No more missed checks, every single one gets done! - For those unsure which settings best align, YAML presets make choosing easy every time.
## Bugfixes - And logic bugs were swatted out, so neat, like tiny flies removed before repeat! - Connecting once could make you repeat, your slot name twice to take your seat.
## Known Issues - Apworld has a 1/3 chance of a failed gen due to a RecursionError of "maximum recursion depth exceeded". This is planned to be fixed in the next update and will be ready for a public release.

entry.title: Divinity Original Sin 2 v0.6.0
entry.content:
New: - Containtersanity is fully functional. There are two options, Chest only and Everything, which do exactly what you think they do. Chests add 65/191/259/364 checks. Everything adds 836/2622/2940/4915 checks - Receiving items will now display a notification in game - Unique gear is included and is replacing the random gear items. These will be scaled to the level you are when you obtain them. - Reworked item pool to contain a consistent percentage of the types of items in all non-containersanity goals
Changes: - Kniles the Flenser is now a hit list option - The source hounds by Kniles area are now checks - The beastmaster and pets found during Red Ink in the Ledger are now checks - Fluorescent Voidlings are back as checks after a bugfix - Kemms vault's guards are now checks
Bugfixes: - Reworked how kills are recognized fixing rare occurrences where a kill without a damage owner didn't send checks, and also now recognizes enemies that kill themselves. Should be far more stable and consistent - Fixed multiworld source points not progressing the visits with your god in act 2 during Powerful Awakening - Fixed multiworld Source Amulet and Scroll of Atonement not being suitable for cheating the path of blood in act 4 - Fixed typos in Corrosive Touch Scroll and Alexandar
Setup Guide [here](https://github.com/Intaiachi/ArchipelagoDOS2/blob/main/worlds/dos2/docs/steup_en.md)
DOS2 mod pak file [Github](https://github.com/Intaiachi/DOS2-Archipelago-Mod/releases), [Steam Workshop](https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3741893354)

entry.title: Bayonetta v1.3.0
entry.content:
## v1.3
Major content expansion: all 44 treasure chests are now locations, plus goal options, expanded heart/pearl pools.
### Added - **44 Treasure Chest Locations** — Every Umbra Witches' final resting place is now an AP location (IDs 60301‑60345). Opening a chest automatically sends the check; the client detects them by polling the lane‑flag memory addresses mapped during development. - **Goal Options** — Three goal modes available in YAML: - `all_chapters` — Complete all 17 chapters including Requiem - `chapter_count` — Complete a set number of chapters (Requiem can be one) - `boss_rush` — Only the 6 boss chapters + Requiem
- "Chapter IV: The Cardinal Virtue of Fortitude", - "Chapter VII: The Cardinal Virtue of Temperance", - "Chapter XI: The Cardinal Virtue of Justice", - "Chapter XIII: The Cardinal Virtue of Prudence", - "Chapter XIV: Isla Del Sol", - "Chapter XVI: The Lumen Sage",
- `chapter_count_no_requiem` — Complete X chapters, Requiem not required - **`goal_chapter_count` YAML option** — Sets the target number for count‑based goals (range 1‑17, default 8). - **`include_chests` YAML option** — Toggle treasure chest locations on or off (default on). - **Expanded Heart / Pearl Pool** — Every seed now includes 40 Broken Witch Hearts and 16 Broken Moon Pearls by default, ensuring full HP and MP progression is always possible.
### Improved - **Shutdown Sequence** — Should close the game properly now and not leave it running in the background after closing it. - **Goal logic** — Completion conditions now correctly count collected (checked) locations, so count‑based goals trigger as soon as the target is met.
### Downloads - **`dinput8.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`). - **`bayonetta.apworld`** — place in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder. - **`z.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`). - **Update both files** — the client and apworld work together for the new chest locations and goal options.
**Existing seeds keep their original logic** — goal and chest changes apply to newly generated seeds only. Grab the updated `.apworld` and regenerate to get them.
Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — feedback drives every update.

entry.title: Bayonetta v1.4.0
entry.content:
## v1.4
The big one since v1.3 — a full generator rewrite that fixes every goal, safer chest/technique handling, three cross-game link protocols, ten traps, a MacGuffin hunt, and a smarter in-game tracker.
### What's New
**New goal: MacGuffin Hunt** — A configurable number of **Eyes of the World Fragments** are scattered across the multiworld, and you win the moment you've collected enough — no Requiem required, no final boss, just the hunt. **`macguffins_required`** (default 10, range 1–100) sets how many you need, and **`macguffins_total`** (default 15, range 1–100) sets how many exist. Both accept standard AP weighted YAML values (`macguffins_total: {30: 50, random-range-1-100: 20}`). If you ask for more Eyes than the pool can fit, the generator caps them to what fits instead of failing — Ship of Harkinian Triforce Hunt style.
**Ten new trap items** — Junk checks can now bite back. The full pool: - **Pickpocket** — Steals up to 10,000 Halos. - **Bloodletting** — Halves your current HP (never kills). - **Fragile Witch** — Sets you to 1 HP. Don't get hit. - **Magic Drain** — Empties your magic gauge. - **Amnesia** — Forgets a random technique you own for 30 seconds, then gives it back. - **Sticky Fingers** — Swipes up to 3 of one random consumable. - **Squish** — Bayonetta gets flattened for 20 seconds. (Makes you slippery and heavy) - **Angel Ambush** — Three random rank-and-file angels spawn on you. - **Grace & Glory** — The claw duo joins your fight. - **???** — Play a session to find out... 💋
Ambush enemies queue up if you're in a menu and pounce the moment you're back in gameplay. A new **`trap_percentage`** YAML option (default 15) controls how much of the junk pool becomes traps — set it to 0 for a trap-free seed.
**Three new link protocols, all off by default** - **Damage Link** — Damage you take is shared with every other Damage Link player, and theirs with you. Shared damage always leaves you at least 1 HP, so it stings without killing. - **Trap Link** — When a trap fires on you, it fires on every other Trap Link player too. Other games' traps fire the same trap here when Bayonetta has a match, or a random Bayonetta trap when it doesn't — you never sit one out. - **Ring Link** — Halos you collect are shared as rings with other Ring Link players (1 ring = 100 Halos), and their rings become your Halos. Shop purchases are never shared, so buying Rodin won't bankrupt your friends. Batched send/receive summaries keep the log readable when playing next to Sonic worlds.
All three can be toggled live from the in-game menu next to Death Link.
**Enzo's Pocket Change** — A new junk filler worth exactly 137 Halos. His cut, after expenses.
**Smarter tracker tab** - **GO Mode banner** — A gold "★ GO MODE — your goal is one step away!" line appears when you're one clear, one Eye, or one boss short of victory, tuned to whichever goal you picked. - **MacGuffin counter** — On hunt seeds, the tracker header shows "✦ Eyes of the World Fragments: 7 / 10" and turns green once you hit the required count.
**Weapon shop logic** — The generator now knows that buying a weapon at the Gates of Hell requires its Golden LP, so it will never hide a progression item behind a weapon you can't buy yet. With Golden LPs turned off, important items are kept out of the weapon shop entirely.
**Hint groups** — You can now hint whole categories at once in the client console: `!hint Golden LPs`, `!hint Weapons`, `!hint Chapter Unlocks`, and more.
**Chest-free seeds fully supported** — Turning chests off now works cleanly from generation to gameplay: the seed leaves them out, and the game stops watching for them.
### Fixed
- **Goals didn't match their names** — The goal you picked in your YAML wasn't the goal you actually got: *Chapter Count* generated as *All Chapters*, *Boss Rush* generated as a chapter count, and *No Requiem* still required Requiem. On top of that, the server considered every seed "finished" as soon as Requiem was reachable, no matter your goal. All goals now do exactly what they say and match what the game checks in-game. - **Boss Rush was missing two bosses** — The game only checked 4 of the 6 boss chapters, so Boss Rush could finish early. Chapters XIII and XVI now count like they always should have. - **HP traps and Damage Link were being reverted mid-frame** — Writing HP to one memory slot let the game snap it back from the other on the very next frame, so Bloodletting, Fragile Witch, and incoming shared damage silently did nothing. Both slots are now written together, matching how Death Link already worked. - **Most Halo bundles did nothing** — 7 of the 12 Halo amounts (1,000 / 2,500 / 7,500 / 20,000 / 30,000 / 75,000 / 200,000) were silently thrown away when you received them. They now actually pay out. - **Turning chests off could break the whole multiworld** — Generating with chests disabled could fail outright, and in games with more than one Bayonetta player it could even strip chests from *their* seeds too. Fixed properly. - **Unbeatable seeds with techniques off** — Chapter V requires Beast Within, but with techniques turned off that item didn't exist, so the seed could never be finished. The requirement now only applies when techniques are actually randomized (otherwise you just buy it at the shop like normal). - **Dead items removed** — "Witch Heart (Full)" and "Moon Pearl (Full)" did nothing when received, so they're no longer placed in seeds. (Broken fragments still work and still add up.) - **Item pool always fits** — Extra hearts, pearls, consumable stacks, and Halos now fill the seed to exactly the right size no matter which options you turn off — no more too-many or too-few items. - **Docs corrected** — There are 45 chests, not 44 (Chapter IX has 11).
### Download
- **`dinput8.dll`** — put this in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`). - **`z.dll`** — put this in your Bayonetta game folder too (next to `Bayonetta.exe`). - **`bayonetta.apworld`** — put this in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder (replace the old one). - **You must regenerate** — unlike v1.3.1, this update changes the generator. New games need to be generated with the new `.apworld`. Old seeds will still play fine with the new DLL, but the goal, logic, and new-item additions only apply to freshly generated seeds.
### Heads-up
- Everyone in the multiworld who plays Bayonetta should be on the new `.apworld` before generating — mixing old and new versions in one generation is asking for trouble. - Fresh-save advice from v1.3.1 still applies: old saves that already own shop items will insta-send those checks on connect.
Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — feedback drives every update.

entry.title: Bayonetta v1.4.1
entry.content:
### Optional Update!
- This is just a quick release to change the MacGuffin Items to be called `**Memory Fragments**` instead of `**Eyes of the World Fragments**`, I do believe that it does fit more. - This is an Optional Update! If the name doesn't bother you, you do not need to update.
Thank You to those who voted in the poll! 💋
### Download
- **`dinput8.dll`** — put this in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`). - **`z.dll`** — put this in your Bayonetta game folder too (next to `Bayonetta.exe`). - **`bayonetta.apworld`** — put this in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder (replace the old one). - **You must regenerate** — this update changes the generator. New games need to be generated with the new `.apworld`.
### Heads-up
- Everyone in the multiworld who plays Bayonetta should be on the new `.apworld` before generating — mixing old and new versions in one generation is asking for trouble. - Fresh-save advice still applies: old saves that already own shop items will insta-send those checks on connect.
Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — feedback drives every update.

entry.title: Crypt of the NecroDancer v0.7.0
entry.content:
### Changes - Completely refactors the client into separate files for easier management - Implements a save state system into the client for more comprehensive mod-client desync management - Adds a new Goal: Golden Lute Shards. Collect all of the Golden Lute Shards spread around the multiworld! - Adds a new Victory Trigger option. To complete your game, you must complete one of the following: - Ensemble Mode: Complete one All Zones Run with all of your unlocked characters! - Boss Rush: Complete 4 (5 with Amplified) bosses back-to-back! - Expensive Purchase: Purchase an expensive item in the AP lobby to complete your run! - Disabled: There is no victory condition! Just complete your goal! - Adds a new Buff Items option: Add items that give you access to character-specific buffs in the AP lobby - When disabled, character buffs are only locked by not having access to the respective character. - Removes ~40 traps from the item pool to better curate the rest for Crypt of the NecroDancer. - The removed traps are only accessible for TrapLink! More traps can be added back once they reach a better quality threshold. - Attempts to fix the vendored zstandard issue blocking Linux/Mac client running for those using the frozen version of Archipelago - Renames "Leek" item to "Spring Onion". "Leek" is now an alias for "Spring Onion". - Renames "Shop Stock Unlock" item to "Shop Restock".
Please see the [setup file](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/blob/crypt-of-the-necrodancer/worlds/cotnd/docs/setup_en.md) for getting started.
Please inform me of any issues through the associated [Crypt of the NecroDancer channel in the Archipelago Discord](https://discord.com/channels/731205301247803413/1192775219740422176) or through [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/lastingParadox/Archipelago-CotND/issues).

entry.title: The Grinch v1.6.0r2r2r2r2r2r2r2r2
entry.content:
## Changes - A sleigh part option joins the game today, mixing multiworld paths or old vanilla play! - Mission item randomizing joins the show, in familiar spots or shuffled flow! - Binoculars are now in `gadgets_to_randomize` by design. No need to add them yourself, they'll show up every time! - No more crates get squashed on Mount Crumpit’s steep height, now every one can be collected with ease and delight! - Randomized minigames now dance and play, gift rooms use keys to clear the way. - Named rats await with rewards to earn, return Santa's reindeer to Whoville's Mayor in turn! - Some locations now support sending checks one by one. No more missed checks, every single one gets done! - For those unsure which settings best align, YAML presets make choosing easy every time.
## Bugfixes - And logic bugs were swatted out, so neat, like tiny flies removed before repeat! - Connecting once could make you repeat, your slot name twice to take your seat.

entry.title: Archipelago Visual Tracker v0.3.0
entry.content:
**What's new:** - Items tab: Display received items (with filters) - Mapping tab, hide out_of_logic tabs by default (toggelable)
**Fixes:** - Potential race condition with UT's internal map system

entry.title: Universal Tracker v0.3.2
entry.content:
## What's Changed
* Fix that one error that kept coming up ( o7 raise string) * fixed addon wrapper with passing arguments * Write a deferred event doc by @Jouramie in https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/pull/137
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/compare/Tracker_v0.3.1...Tracker_v0.3.2

entry.title: Factorio: Platformer v0.4.4
entry.content:
## Fixes * Fix craftsanity rules by @lepideble in https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/pull/69
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/lepideble/factorio-apworld/compare/platformer-0.4.3...platformer-0.4.4

entry.title: Manual_PewDiePieLegendoftheBrofist_WolfBoi008 v1.2.1
entry.content: # Known Issues None for now... # Changelog ## Manual No changes. ## Map - Made the map less terrible. - More specifically, it defaults to a set of 3 split images that allow you to see the map a lot better. You can still use the full map view if you wish, but I don't recommend it. The image's height makes it hard to make out anything on it well due to there being no ability to zoom.

entry.title: Mega Man X2 v2.0.0
entry.content: # Big FAT rewrite. # Info * [Setup](https://github.com/TheLX5/Archipelago/wiki/Mega-Man-X2#setup) # Changes * Full FxPak support * 100% local saves * Bye bye `/resync` * Added DamageLink support * Added a Manager launcher program * Can disable Energy/Damage/Death Links on a given patch * Several YAML options are now present in the Manager * Default button configuration * X4 Dash Jumps Toggle * Shoryuken input method * Palettes * Removed lives as an AP item and as a system in the game * Player's max HP is now capped to 64 (up from 56) * Reworked HP bars so they don't wrap around the screen * A HP Pickup icon will appear below the HP bar during normal gameplay when it exceeds 32 HP * Pause HP bar no longer wraps around the screen * Reused lives counter to show a numeric HP counter * Added several new chip items: * **`Rapid Five Chip` (MMX5)**: Increases the amount of buster shots on screen to 5 * **`Speed Shot Chip` (MMX5)**: Increases lemons horizontal speed by 50% * **`Buster Plus Chip` (MMX5)**: Increases Buster damage by 1 * **`Weapon Plus Chip` (MMX6)**: Increases Weapon damage by 1 * **`D-Converter Chip` (MMX6)**: Refills the active weapon when taking damage * **`D-Barrier Chip` (MMX6)**: Doubles the I-frames after getting hit * **`Item Plus Chip` (MMX7)**: Increases item drop rates by roughly 33% * **`Spike Walker Chip` (MMX8)**: Halves speed when sliding down a wall * Dashed lemons now appear green instead of yellow/orange * All weapons are now refilled upon dying * Players now go directly to the Game Clear screen once Sigma is defeated (removes credits sequence) * Players are now redirected to X-Hunter Base 4 when all conditions are met * Bosses have a minimum of 2 HP across all HP rando modes instead of 1 HP * Boss Weakness Plando now accepts multiple weaknesses at once * Added Boss HP Plando * Tweaked Boss Weakness Shuffle * Added Swapped and Chaotic Triple options * Renamed Shuffled to Simple * X-Hunter Base tweaks * No longer can be opened with Weapons, Armor Upgrades, Heart Tanks or Sub Tanks * Optimized X-Hunter Base Opening logic code from the ROM side (should experience slightly less lag overall) * This forces you to watch the Progress Screen in order to process X-Hunter Base unlocking criteria * Adjusted Serges' fights (toggable from the Manager) * [Serges I] Serges can take damage at any point * [Serges I] Removed shield/No longer taunts * [Serges I] No longer gets stunned by weapons * [Serges II] Removed immunity from Serges' capsule * [Serges II] Actual hurtbox enlarged so it's easier to hit * Fixed some uncommon crashes on the pause menu with a full arsenal

entry.title: Wargroove 2 v1.1.9
entry.content: # Features - New map by KoiiBlitz: Thieves' Town - Logic fixes for Wargroove Warriors - Giant Issue Fixes

entry.title: Hades2Rogue v0.7.1
entry.content: Bug Fixes: - Sisyphus icon mapped incorrectly for the Hades 2 tab. - Hopefully setup the mod to adjust for a version mismatch - If a helper room is rolled and the player hasn't unlocked any helpers, it should now reroll to a different type of room. - Fixed loading order when Archipelago launches to correct for some conflicts with other Apworlds

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.21r2r2
entry.content: - One more fix to Legend weather - Fixed cutscenes getting stuck when waiting on an non-existing NPC to emote - Fixed randomized Beach Obelisk exit point going to the wrong tile - Fixed the ability to use a minecart from the "wrong tile" and it not triggering the proper ER

entry.title: Toy Story 2 v2.1.0
entry.content:
# New: Map page in the Archipelago client
With [Universal Tracker](https://github.com/FarisTheAncient/Archipelago/releases) installed, the client now shows a visual map tab alongside the usual in-logic location list. It uses the same maps and pin positions as the PopTracker pack.
- All 12 maps, including Level Select and the boss map - Every non-coin location, plus coin locations in both coinsanity modes - Auto-tabs to whichever level you are currently in, using the level info the client already publishes - Shows what is reachable rather than what you are holding
Coin handling depends on your Coinsanity Checks Bundle Size:
- **Size 1** (default): each coin is its own check, so coins appear on the map at their exact positions. It will however, not be able to show you coins remaining. You'll need the PopTracker for that. - **Size 5 and above**: coins are grouped into `Coin Bundle N` checks. A bundle covers several coins and has no single position, so each level gets one "Coin Bundles" pin placed where the PopTracker pack draws its coin counter, on both the level map and Level Select.
Whichever mode a seed uses, the other set of pins is hidden automatically.
Note that this is Universal Tracker's map, not the PopTracker pack itself. It reads the apworld's logic directly, so it cannot drift out of sync with the apworld. The PopTracker pack is still the richer standalone tracker.
# Music randomizer is now seed-locked
Normal mode previously shuffled the track list inside the Lua connector using an unseeded random number generator, so the shuffle changed every time the script reloaded. Disconnecting and reconnecting gave you different music.
The mapping is now rolled during generation using the seed's own RNG and sent through slot_data. It is identical on every reconnect, identical for anyone else looking at the same slot, and appears in the spoiler log.
# Bug Fixes - **Al's Penthouse coins sending early.** Two coins had incorrect memory addresses, which caused them to send as soon as the level loaded:
- Living Room - Vulture 2: `0x0C3A6E` corrected to `0x0C3802` - Kitchen - Fridge Door: `0x0C2CEC` corrected to `0x0C350A`
- Alleys and Gullies - Central Hub - Zurg Boat 1 also had a stale duplicate address in `coin_data.py`; the two data files now agree everywhere.
- **Rocket Boots not re-locking correctly in Alleys and Gullies.** Two container bytes, `0x19E9CC` and `0x19E9CD`, were listed under both the Grappling Hook and Rocket Boots. If you owned the Grappling Hook but not Rocket Boots, the unlock routine wrote zero over the values the lock routine had just written, and since these writes only fire when ownership changes, whichever ran last stuck for the rest of the level visit. The bytes now belong to Rocket Boots alone. This was the only cross-gadget address conflict in the game.
- **Laser UI hidden while holding Grappling Hooks.** At Laser level 3 the UI was suppressed, which hid the Grappling Hook count. It is now correctly shows the amount of Grappling Hooks you have
## Options
The Easy skips description now reads: "Easy is incredibly easy skips that anyone can do. They may require trial and error, but you won't have to try for too long."
# Logic - Corrections in the following levels: - Andy's House - Al's Space Land (This one was super broken) - Al's Toy Barn - Al's Penthouse
# Known Issues - Double Jump will sometime works if Buzz is jumping into angled geometry. It's not easy to replicate and probably will never be fixed - Saving the game could potentially freeze the game. There's no need to save since you have the qol save state and the AP will give you everything on a load. Also keep in mind that the PS1 version of this game takes forever to load in general. Give it enough time to think - Cutscene warping may still be a thing. Do the right thing and leave a level if you're not supposed to be there... but also let me know, this bug is hard to pin down - The Second Zurg Cutscene doesn't play from a trap. (I fought this one the entire development... I don't care anymore) - Coinsanity will sometimes cause enemies to blink into existence briefly! Spooky...

entry.title: Toy Story 2 v2.1.1
entry.content:
# Bug Fixes - Double Jump suppression is finally fixed. You may find Single Jumps harder to make now. This is by design. The double jump suppression is much much tighter now.
# Logic - Corrections in the following levels: - Construction Yard Race Token. Now requires Double Jump for Easy Skips
# Known Issues - Saving the game could potentially freeze the game. There's no need to save since you have the qol save state and the AP will give you everything on a load. Also keep in mind that the PS1 version of this game takes forever to load in general. Give it enough time to think - Cutscene warping may still be a thing. Do the right thing and leave a level if you're not supposed to be there... but also let me know, this bug is hard to pin down - The Second Zurg Cutscene doesn't play from a trap. (I fought this one the entire development... I don't care anymore) - Coinsanity will sometimes cause enemies to blink into existence briefly! Spooky...

entry.title: Grandia v0.9.9r2
entry.content:
**What's new:** - Updated + New QOL Shortcuts (Turbo mode / Encounter toggle). - Gameplay Balance options (Vanilla / Redux). - Better Save Gates: Prevent loading a save not linked to the current AP Slot.
**Fixes:** - Save load sync broken on Memory Card slot 2.

entry.title: Xenoblade X v0.2.1
entry.content: - Add support for `Rule Builder`. - Better generation time. - Revert Chapter 12 logic again. - Restructure big parts of the codebase.

entry.title: Bayonetta v1.5
entry.content:
## v1.5
Umbran Tears, three deadly new traps, optional verse‑rank challenges, and a scroll‑locking fix that puts the v1.4 regression to rest.
### What's New
**Umbran Tears of Blood — 18 Normal‑mode locations** All 18 Umbran Tears that can be collected on Normal difficulty are now proper Archipelago locations, each with its own check. Collecting a crow fires the location check instantly, with the classic red “✓ Tear” notification. A new YAML option, **`include_tears`** (default off), controls them — they’re opt‑in because tears are difficulty‑specific and only Normal is mapped right now. Hard and Non‑Stop ∞ Climax tears can be added in a future update.
**Verse Rank (Medal) locations** Every single verse now has an optional bonus location that fires when you achieve the target rank. A new YAML option, **`verse_rank_target`**, lets you choose the grade required — Stone (always on), Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum, or Pure Platinum. Rank locations can hold any item, including progression, so aiming high can gate important items behind skilled play. The in‑game Rank Finder tool (Admin → Rank Finder) helps you map rank‑storage addresses if you want to extend it.
- So now we have a total of 348 Locations to check!
**Three new traps** The mischief pool grows again. - **Alfheim Curse** — You can only survive three more hits before being reduced to 1 HP. A counter ticks down on‑screen with each blow. - **Berserk** — Every active enemy instantly becomes enraged. - **Gracious & Glorious** — The upgraded claw duo joins the fight. Faster, meaner, and definitely not Grace & Glory.
**Scroll‑bar lock fixed** The chapter‑blocking hook now writes to memory only when the unlock limit actually changes, instead of every frame. This restores normal mouse‑wheel scrolling in the Load Game, Gates of Hell shop, and Chapter Select menus — the lock that crept back in v1.4 is gone.
### Improvements
- Tear location IDs now match the six‑digit format the apworld uses, so tear checks display proper names instead of “? Tear”. (From my Bug tests)
### Downloads
- **`dinput8.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`). - **`z.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder too. - **`bayonetta.apworld`** — place in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder (replace the old one).
**Existing seeds keep their original logic** — tear locations, new traps, verse‑rank challenges, and the scroll fix all apply to freshly generated seeds. Old seeds will still play fine with the new DLL, but the new content needs a regeneration.
Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — every update is shaped by player feedback.

entry.title: Bayonetta v1.6
entry.content:
## v1.6 Witch Time joins the item pool, traps get per-trap control, and technique locations lose their "Shop:" prefix.
### What's New
**Witch Time as an unlockable item** Witch Time is now a randomized progression item and is **locked from the start of every run**. While locked, a perfect dodge simply doesn't trigger it — the activation is suppressed at the source, so there's no flash, no sound sting, no half-second of slowdown before it cuts out. Dodging still gives you i-frames and dodge offset; you just don't get the reward until the item shows up.
Two deliberate carve-outs: - **Bat Within** still performs its dodge and still saves you. It just doesn't slow time afterwards — a panic button without the payoff. - **Bracelet of Time** still works normally. It's a separate item you have to find, buy and equip, and a Witch-Time-less run makes it genuinely worth the accessory slot for once.
Witch Time follows the existing **`include_techniques`** option — turn that off and you start with it as usual. It has no dedicated location; the game keeps no ownership flag for it, so unlike the other techniques there's no way for the client to detect you learning it yourself.
**Per-trap toggles** A new YAML option, **`trap_weights`**, lets you pick exactly which traps can appear and how common each one is. Set a trap to **0** to switch it off entirely. Values are *relative weights*, not percentages — a trap at 20 is twice as likely as one at 10, and they don't need to add up to anything. Only applies when `trap_percentage` is above 0. Zero everything out and no traps are placed at all, whatever your percentage says.
```yaml trap_percentage: 20 trap_weights: Pickpocket Trap: 10 Bloodletting Trap: 0 # off Fragile Witch Trap: 0 # off Magic Drain Trap: 10 Amnesia Trap: 5 Sticky Fingers Trap: 10 Squish Trap: 20 # twice as likely as most Angel Ambush Trap: 10 Grace & Glory Trap: 5 Nemesis Trap: 1 # rare Alfheim Curse Trap: 5 Berserk Trap: 5 Gracious & Glorious Trap: 1 ```
### Improvements
- Technique locations dropped the "Shop:" prefix — `Shop: Learn Bat Within` is now just `Learn Bat Within`. Location IDs are unchanged, and the tracker now splits "Shop" and "Techniques" into separate groups.
- Fixed the `Loading...` screen when trying to go to the options menu.
### Downloads - **dinput8.dll** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to Bayonetta.exe). - **z.dll** — place in your Bayonetta game folder too. - **bayonetta.apworld** — place in your Archipelago custom_worlds folder (replace the old one).
**Existing seeds keep their original logic** — tear locations, new traps, verse‑rank challenges, and the scroll fix all apply to freshly generated seeds. Old seeds will still play fine with the new DLL, but the new content needs a regeneration.
Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — every update is shaped by player feedback.
WARNING: If you update to this version while playing on a older version your Witch Time will not work! Play on previous release until you generate a new Multiworld with the new apworld.

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v88
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!

entry.title: Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes v0.3.0a0
entry.content:
Changelog:
- Fix logic issue with Praetorian Pact bomb 5.2 Insanity for 8 and 9 modules solved when hardlock modules is disabled. - Reworked the archipelago.json file to be in-line with the requirements and have versions numbers.

entry.title: Keep Talking and Nobody Explodes v0.3.0b0
entry.content:
Changelog:
- Fix a bug where a misplaced parenthesis would create an error

entry.title: Crash Team Racing v0.1.4
entry.content:
The quality-of-life train. The long-standing Gemstone Valley pause crash is fixed for real, boss outros play when they should, traps last long enough to matter, the first launch walks you through setup instead of erroring, and the game finally has proper credits. Option texts got cut in half so picking settings no longer means scrolling.
Thanks MarioSpore, PerihLeaff and wheezingteapot for the reports that shaped this cycle, and everyone in the Discord who keeps breaking things in useful ways.
### Downloads
- **Windows:** `ctr-archipelago-v0.1.4-windows-x86.zip` (contains everything) - **Steam Deck / Linux:** `ctr-archipelago-v0.1.4-linux-x86.tar.gz` - **Hosts and players:** `ctr.apworld` and `Crash.Team.Racing.yaml` are attached separately - **Debugging a crash?** `ctr_native_ap.debug` holds the Linux debug symbols, matched to this exact build
📖 [Setup guide](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/blob/main/SETUP.md) ([as shipped](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/blob/v0.1.4/SETUP.md)). **Update the client and the apworld together, they are a pair.**
### Fixed
- **The Gemstone Valley pause crash is fixed.** A hub with every pad open sat two instances under an internal cap, and opening the pause menu pushed it over. The cap is raised in hubs and a full pool now skips an icon instead of crashing. If you ever see a missing pause icon, that is the safety net doing its job, please report it. ([#56](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/56)) - **Boss outros play on a first win even when you already hold Keys.** The old check read your received Keys as "boss already beaten" and skipped the cutscene, starting from the last boss backward. First wins now play the outro, repeat wins skip it. ([#111](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/111)) - **Arenas-off seeds can no longer ask for Purple CTR Tokens anywhere.** Verified with a 600-seed census across both unlock modes and all density settings, zero violations, and confirmed in game. Reported by MarioSpore. ([#118](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/118)) - **Crashes that unwind through std::terminate or abort now reach the crash reporter** instead of exiting silently. ([#110](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/110)) - **Crash reports name the faulting module and thread context**, so a `ctr-ap-crash.txt` from the wild is actually diagnosable. ([#119](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/119)) - **Linux distros without 32-bit audio support get a clear, actionable message** instead of silent audio failure, and the setup guide documents the fix (installing the 32-bit ALSA-PipeWire bridge). Reported by wheezingteapot. ([#113](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/113)) - An out-of-memory condition during a level load now exits with a crash report naming the exact shortfall instead of freezing the game. - **In-race crashes when a crate explosion spawns with the instance pool full are fixed.** On a busy track a TNT or Nitro blast could hit an internal instance limit and take the game down. The explosion effect is now guarded and the blast still deals its damage, so play continues. If you ever see an explosion with no fireball, that is the safety net doing its job, please report it. This is also the likely cause of the Mystery Caves race crashes. ([#57](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/57), [#135](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/pull/135))
### New
- **First launch sets you up instead of erroring out.** The game creates the assets folder, tells you exactly where your disc image goes, accepts any `.bin` filename, and rejects non-disc files with a clear message. ([#114](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/114)) - **Paste works in the connection screen.** Ctrl+V a server address, slot or password straight into the fields; multiline and oversized pastes are handled safely. ([#115](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/115)) - **Traps last 20 seconds** (was 4 to 6), long enough to actually sabotage a race. The boost trap no longer wipes your banked reserves, and the no-brakes trap now pushes you to true USF speed. ([#116](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/116)) - **The game has credits now.** Finishing your goal rolls an AP section (maintainer, randomizer design lineage, the CTR-ModSDK decompilation contributors, ported mods, libraries) ahead of the vanilla roll. ([#117](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/117)) - **Option texts cut in half.** Every option in the template YAML and on the options page now reads as player documentation: what it does, what the values mean, one warning if it matters. The heaviest option dropped from 1,232 characters to under 600. ([apworld #19](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-archipelago-apworld/pull/19)) - **New defaults: `two_stage_density: full` and `one_lap_cups: on`.** Default seeds get the densest two-stage gating and faster cups. Both stay fully configurable, and existing YAMLs that set these options are unaffected. - **Support bundles now carry your seed's full gate tables.** The parsed pad, boss and cup requirements are written to `ctr-ap.log` at connect, so a bug report shows exactly how your seed gates everything.
### Known issues
- **Generation can rarely fail in a multiworld ([#75](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/75)).** Fails loudly at generation, reroll. Solo unaffected. - **Mystery Caves race crash ([#57](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/57))**: a likely root cause was found and fixed this cycle (the crate-explosion crash under Fixed). If a Mystery Caves crash still happens on 0.1.4, please attach `ctr-ap-crash.txt` so it can be confirmed. - **Post-boss cutscene softlock ([#51](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/51))** did not reproduce in release testing, including a deliberate first-win outro with Keys held under the new #111 handling. One clean run is not proof, so it stays listed. - **A burst of trap items received together fires them all at once** rather than queueing them. Harmless but chaotic; a stagger is on the list. - **The map screen can briefly show a cup as closed after its requirement arrives** until the items apply on the next transition. The pads themselves open immediately.
### Testing
Verified in game on the release builds: the pause menu across all five hubs with every pad open (the exact #56 crash scenario, measured two instances from the old cap), first-win and repeat boss outros with Keys held, all five trap types with the duration, boost-reserve and USF checks, connection-screen paste abuse, the assets first-run flow including wrong-file rejection, a full Oxide goal run with the credits roll, and an arenas-off pad sweep confirming no Purple requirements. Logic passed the full fuzz matrix on the exact shipped apworld, 19,500 generations across 12 profiles, zero failures, plus the 600-seed arenas-off census. The connect-time seed verifier passed the 13-profile sweep on the release binary, all thirteen `seed OK (solo: definitive)`, including the community-report regression seed regenerated exactly. The crate-explosion crash fix ([#57](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/57), [#135](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/pull/135)) landed after the matrix; it is native only and additive, so the gates above still hold, and normal play was confirmed with a Hot Air Skyway crate smoke on the release binary.
### Next
The 0.2.0 design campaign: the character phase, item packs, and the adaptive podium rung budget, with solo/offline play ([#89](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/89)) behind those. Custom track support is being explored in the open ([#133](https://github.com/dowlle/ctr-native-ap/issues/133)). No dates, hobby project honesty applies.
---
**Checksums** - zip `2d96718e2b31a3cb33554a833203b895a03fea62ae53688fa18ff1b9e0352343` - tar.gz `650545efd4f4a1de65ec930d94f8066aace62e0ec2298f2e309a567a0e86155e` - apworld `896d270e1405edfe76c5b5a97631069d1c624b9266c12266087d508c4cc32fbd` - debug `acc6c9568da56e1dbc256821ae6157cd00991415d2a46ba067a35e29a4ddd05b`

entry.title: Muck v1.2.1
entry.content: # The "Sorry for the delay I was away for a few days then got sidetracked making Bad Apple in Shapez but I fixed a few issues and I'm putting that here even if there's more stuff I wanted to add but haven't yet" Update - Added the default weapon option - Fixed the restrictive start - Fixed some generation problems - Made the client look for the Muck.exe and added a world option to change the default path - Fixed a few issues with the items/location ids - Changed the logic for gold equipments and bows - Changed the name for the deathlink option (deathlink -> Deathlink) - Fixed issues that hapened when changing game too fast ## Known Issues - Victory doesn't get sent after finishing the game, when that happens you can either disconnect and reconnect (without closing the client), that should send it, or you can simply ask the host to /release you

entry.title: Factorio: Space Age v2.2.2
entry.content:
# Factorio: Space Age apworld 2.2.2
* Fix item duplication on server restart. Only applies to infinite techs, such as `worker-robot-speed-7`, which is included in `quick_start: true`. Thanks @lepideble for the implementation. [#29](https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/pull/29) * Adjusted balance on `space_technology_level` to no longer reduce the ingredient count for `space-platform-foundation`, `rocket-silo`, and rockets from rocket parts. Thanks to Hah and Silasary for playtesting and balance suggestions.
download: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/releases . general docs: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/en_Factorio_Space_Age.md . setup guide: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/blob/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age/docs/setup_en.md . source code: https://github.com/thejoshwolfe/Archipelago/tree/space-age/worlds/factorio_space_age .

entry.title: Grandia v0.10.0
entry.content:
**What's new:**
- Updated Logic: Changes to Regions (no real Gameplay changes, just better for UT)

entry.title: Dwarf Fortress v1.3.0
entry.content:
## New Features
### Custom Caves Carved into the solid rock between your cavern layers, invisible on the map until a dwarf walks into one.
- Up to six pockets carved at world gen (two per inter-cavern gap), shaped as organic ovals and stocked with **real DF items** at generation time - **Treasure caves** & **Trap caves** - **Cave Map Fragment** items reveal the next cave's location - a coordinate hint for treasure caves, a directional warning for trap caves - Two always-present **secret caves**: Not sure when these were implimented... We've heard that one is close to the surface and the other is a deep loss to the fort...
### Room, Temple & Guildhall Milestones Full set of fortress building/zone milestones.
- Each room type designated (bedroom, office, dining hall, tomb) - **Per-room quality tiers** - Decent, Fine, Great, Grand, Royal for each room type - **Temple tiers** (Shrine, Temple, Temple Complex) and **guildhall tiers** (Guildhall, Grand Guildhall), read from DF's own location value/tier - All of it surfaced on a new **Rooms** section in the panel's Progress tab
### Dwarfsanity Goal A new win condition: collect **every workshop blueprint and every crafting permit** in the pool (requires Crafting Permits enabled).
### Craftsanity for Every Item + In-Workshop Overlay
- Craftsanity expanded to cover (nearly) every craftable item, with a permits-for-all mode and many new item types (metal crafter goods, full clothing and footwear coverage, and more) - A **Craftsanity overlay** marks the workshop task list and work-order picker so you can see at a glance which crafts still owe a check
### Skillsanity: Combat Skills Combat skills are now Skillsanity checks alongside labor skills, with a Skills tab display and their own combat skill-group / selection options.
### Re-embark Recovery Lose a fort and start a new one on the same slot without losing progress.
- Previously received items are re-delivered to the new fort's depot - Delivery is **throttled** (~100 items per poll) so a large history can't flood the game, and **resumes** cleanly if interrupted mid-recovery - Migrants arrive as one consolidated wave, and incoming traps are skipped so a fresh fort isn't immediately overrun
### Reworked Traps Flavorless "nothing" traps replaced with ones that actually do something.
- **Goblin Saboteurs** - goblins slip in and wreck a workshop. *What were they looking for?* - **Ensnaring Webs** - every citizen is caught in cave-spider webbing. *Dwarf is Stuck!* - **Unquenchable Thirst** - the whole fort is struck by a powerful thirst and rushes to drink. *Working up a pretty mighty thirst...* - **Order Sabotage** - every current manager work order is wiped. *Surely, you remember what you had queued?*
### Exclude Difficult Checks Three new YAML toggles that keep progression items out of the hardest end-game checks (they hold filler only), so no partner's run is gated behind a Dwarf Fortress milestone you may never reach.
- `exclude_deep_endgame_checks` - Reached the Magma Sea, Welcome to the Circus, Mined Adamantine - `exclude_top_room_checks` - the Grand/Royal room tiers, Temple Complex, Grand Guildhall - `exclude_top_fortress_checks` - City & Metropolis Established, Duke Appointed, Monarch Takes Residence
### Additional Items & Tools - **Raw Adamantine** (pre-smelting boulder) received items and adamantine detection for the Mined Adamantine check - **Stone Slab** filler item - blank memorial slabs to engrave and build, laying ghosts to rest when caskets are permit-locked
## Improvements - **Themed sieges (Slay Megabeast)**: roaming warbands are now coherent per-civilisation sieges - **goblin, human, elf, or night-creature** hosts - that ramp toward real siege scale with a crossbow contingent, monster escorts, and an elite commander. - **Defense-aware siege scaling**: wave size now scales (capped at 2×) with your fort's defenses - trap density and standing-army size - so a turtled fort still gets a real fight. - **Merchant's Shop options**: added an on/off toggle and a shop price multiplier, and shop prices are now banded by Merchant's Coffer tier (ceiling raised to 100k). - **Legendary Wealth goal** now tracks **lifetime** coins minted + gems cut (a stable running total) instead of a live treasury scan that dropped when you spent. - **Panel expansion**: infrastructure, biology, endgame, military, titles, and per-room quality readouts; a Permits tab and a Caves tab; a wider layout and larger shop-name field. - **Room milestones cascade** on a tier jump - building straight to a high tier now also fires the lower ones (the Shrine check is monotonic with Temple / Temple Complex). - **Performance Improvements**: This might have just been a Kicka issue. If anyone encounters any performance issues, PLEASE notify Kicka or post an issue on Github - **Docs**: README restructured into four top-level groups; Skillsanity, Merchant's Shop, Progressive Mining Depth, and definitive per-goal completion requirements all documented.
## Fixes - **DeathLink never sending**: citizen deaths are now counted via a `was_citizen()` helper - `isCitizen()` returns false for dead units. - **Mined Adamantine false-fired** on receiving the adamantine Artifact Weapon, Artifact Armor, or Master Builder's Codex - those no longer count as mining adamantine. - **Persistent-storage pollution**: craft counts are now stored only for items that actually have a craftsanity check this seed. - **`military_training` unlock max** corrected (4 to 10) so the Unlocks panel shows the right total. - **Gem treasury value**, **magma-sea breach detection**, and the **cavern mining buffer** (+2 z-levels) corrected. - **Trade depot** no longer clears your starting items when a placement candidate fails. - **Glass liquid containers** are gated behind glass, and **ceramic** craft work orders are now counted. - **Assorted craftsanity / skillsanity logic-rule fixes**
## Upgrade Notes
- Update the **mod and the apworld together** to 1.3 - versions are match-checked. - **Regeneration is required**: the location and item set changed (room/cave/skill checks, new options), so existing seeds are not compatible.

entry.title: Xenoblade X v0.2.2
entry.content: - Fix `KEY: Blade License` not setting division on 1.0.2U

entry.title: Deep Rock Galactic v0.19.0
entry.content:
** Large Overhaul 0.19 (May Be Incompatible with all Previous Versions)**
- Added Gauntlet [short] goal mode - Completely reworked item generation to allow large range of low and high item and location counts - Added Linux Fix from SpaceCat-Chan - Added fix for client window crash when Goal was reached - Fixed some trap bugs - Fixed some UI bugs - Fixed some debug bugs - Minor code rewrites and comments for clarity
**INFO FILES (Sideloader must be used with the .pak file for PreRelease Builds)** [INSTRUCTIONS](https://docs.google.com/document/d/16At-2kS_azJRf9PdUcZeA8Esfoh6kNm2dWVWy8u8wA0/edit?usp=sharing) [MOD on MOD.IO](https://mod.io/g/drg/m/test-archipelago-integration#description) [SIDELOADER for DRG Mods](https://github.com/trumank/mint) Mod file now included in releases for mint users.

entry.title: Stardew Valley v8.0.24
entry.content:
## Mod - Fixed an issue where specials orders that were forced to be repeatable, would still get auto-deleted from the quest log
## Apworld - Fixed several logic issues with Special Orders that require villagers to exist - Added a few missing growth times that weren't being DRed - Fixed an issue where randomizing which crop comes from which seed, would accidentally keep the other aspects from the crop, instead of the ones from the seed. Such as growth season. - Sanitize Fish data so that desert fish can always be catched in the sun - Added rain totem logic to fish that are catchable in the rain in winter - Sanitized Fish data so that all extended family fish can always be caught within the same season - Moved the 5 extended family fish locations to the walnut room region for performance

entry.title: Metroid Dread v0.25.0
entry.content:
## What's Changed * chore(release): v0.24.0 by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/168 * Drop inbound DeathLinks while at a save/nav/map station by @mdietz94 in https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/pull/169
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/mdietz94/dread_ap/compare/v0.24.0...v0.25.0

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v89
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.4): - fix UT connection issue (hopefully)

entry.title: Bayonetta v1.6.5
entry.content:
## v1.6.5
Alfheim overlay tracking, an expanded "Alfheims" location group for easier YAML filtering, and robust crash fixes that put title screen and item tab regressions to rest.
### What's New
**Alfheim Overlay Tracking** The in-game tracker now features complete support for tracking Alfheim portal completions. Alfheims are now cleanly nested directly inside their respective chapters alongside normal verses and chests.
**Expanded "Alfheims" Location Group** The server-side `apworld` location group has been extended so that `"Alfheims"` now properly bundles all related checks together—spanning portals, verse clears, and verse ranks. This makes it effortless for runners to exclude or prioritize Alfheim trials with a single YAML entry.
### Bug Fixes & Stability
**Title Screen Crash Fix** Added robust safety locks (`Stage <= 0`) across health and memory functions to completely prevent crashes and access violations during the 30-second title screen connection phase.
**Item Tab UI Fix** Removed unsafe inventory memory writes that were blanking out the item tab. Full items now auto-consume correctly via native game logic without breaking the UI renderer.
**Amnesia Trap Iterator Fix** Fixed an unsafe iterator invalidation bug in `ProcessTrapTimers` using safe post-increment erasing, preventing rare crashes when an Amnesia Trap expires.
**Compiler & Linker Alignment** Realigned `g_apWitchTimeLocked` to match `volatile bool` across header and source files, clearing up unresolved external symbols (`LNK2001`).
### Downloads
- **`dinput8.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder (next to `Bayonetta.exe`). - **`z.dll`** — place in your Bayonetta game folder too. - **`bayonetta.apworld`** — place in your Archipelago `custom_worlds` folder (replace the old one).
**Existing seeds keep their original logic** — location groups, overlay tracking, and crash fixes apply to freshly generated seeds. Old seeds will still play fine with the new DLL, but updated server-side world rules require a regeneration.
Found a bug or have an idea? [Open an Issue](../../issues) — every update is shaped by player feedback.

entry.title: Brutal Orchestra v1.0.0r2r2
entry.content:
Introduce you new features
1) 2 more Goal types. For amount of pearls and for achievement Brutal Orchestra (this one is for asyncs) 2) Ability sanity. Every character have only 1 slot with random ability (3 from this character + slap) and Progressive Ability add a slot to character (For this to work you must have 50+ additional locations via Bittle, Chests or Shop)
Small QoL
1) Autoscroll and working Enter for chat. F1 can hide chat
Fixes
1) Garden Shop deleted (my mistake, forgot that there is no shop in garden) 2) Every item is should work now
Problems
1) Still require start a run before connecting

entry.title: Borderlands 2 v91
entry.content:
Want to test on the frontlines? Get the latest developments here. Higher likelihood of showstopping issues. Good luck out there, Slab!
setup instructions on the home page and [readme](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/blob/main/README.md)
[sample yamls](https://github.com/EdricY/Bouncy-Loot-God/tree/main/sample-yamls)
new stuff (since 0.5.4): - fix UT connection issue (hopefully) - infinite backpack as yaml setting - AP travels in fast travel menu

entry.title: Final Fantasy XIII-2 v0.1.2
entry.content:
No functional changes in this release. - Adjust default option for DLC locations and items to be disabled to prevent issues with accidental use without the DLC Restoration mod - Add new "/debug" command to client to help in diagnosis of issues with item granting.
Requires FFModdingWPF FF13-2 standalone rando version 0.8.2.51+ - https://github.com/Bartz24/FFModdingWPF The standalone rando has a link to the required version of Nova Chrysalia required to install the generated modpacks

entry.title: pokemon_stadium v0.7.0
entry.content: ### Add Mew and Mewtwo as items - Mew and Mewtwo are now in the item pool as unlockable rentals - Both can be used in GLC and Prime Cup. They are both illegal in Poke Cup and will not appear there - Receiving the items will unlock them in both GLC and Prime Cup

entry.title: Final Fantasy XIII-2 v0.1.3
entry.content:
Fix generation when DLC locations are disabled
Widen debug logging when enabled

entry.title: Hades2Rogue v0.7.2
entry.content: ### Bugfixes and Adjustments - Fixed a couple bugs that the player was unlikely to ever see. - Made some adjustments to better future-proof - Removed game assets from the client - Wrote a setup guide and general info document within a docs folder in the APWorld - Other minor adjustments ### Mod Unchanged, only effects the APWorld
